title: Validate BLE and SLIP transport integration rows
description: Execute declared BLE, SLIP LCI scenarios from clean EBS Zephyr worktree on supported native/QEMU targets. Record full provenance (base commit, patch SHA, west manifest, Zephyr version, exact west build/run commands with env, exit codes, log+artifact hashes). No skips, no .35.6 duplication, strict clean-worktree checks. Use approved AWS_PROFILE=personal builder in us-west-2c with vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb only.
